hooks.command: if [ ! -d "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/agentic-plugins-marketplace/hmcts-sdlc-orchestrator" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "This repo expects the hmcts-sdlc-orchestrator plugin (SDLC pipeline agents/skills). It is not installed on this machine yet. Run: /plugin marketplace add hmcts/agentic-plugins-marketplace, then /plugin install hmcts-sdlc-orchestrator@agentic-plugins-marketplace"}'; fi
